ENDLESS_CHOICE_EVENT.title: Endless Mutation
ENDLESS_CHOICE_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descr: The loop tightens. Choose one mutation to carry into this act.
ENDLESS_CHOICE_EVENT.pages.DONE.picked: The choice takes hold. The loop grows stranger.
ENDLESS_CHOICE_EVENT.pages.DONE.no_choic: The loop offers no new mutation this time.
ENDLESS_CHOICE_EVENT.pages.DONE.already_: That mutation is already part of your run.
